title: zerna fibrosa
intro: Zerna fibrosa, also known as the Golden Chamomile or Pineapple Weed, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its yellow flowers and pineapple-like fruit. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Zerna fibrosa include relief from digestive issues, reduced stress and anxiety, and improved immune function. The herbal preparations of Zerna fibrosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically for skin and wound care.
